flask_sessions.question: What exact exception does NullSession raise when you try to modify it?
What is the exact error message raised when writing to a NullSession?
flask_sessions.answer: The session is unavailable because no secret key was set.  Set the secret_key on the application to something unique and secret.

flask_sessions.question: What is the value of SecureCookieSessionInterface.salt?
What is the value of SecureCookieSessionInterface.key_derivation?
What is the default value of SessionMixin.modified?
What is the default value of SecureCookieSession.modified?
What is the default value of SessionMixin.new?
What is the default value of SessionMixin.accessed?
What dict key does the SessionMixin.permanent property read from?
What config key does get_cookie_path fall back to if SESSION_COOKIE_PATH is not set?
What header does save_session add to the response when session.accessed is True?
What happens in open_session when a BadSignature exception is caught?
flask_sessions.answer: It returns a new empty session (session_class())

flask_sessions.question: How is max_age computed in SecureCookieSessionInterface.open_session?
What serializer class is used for the session cookie payload?
What class does SecureCookieSessionInterface.get_signing_serializer return?
What is the value of SessionInterface.pickle_based?
What base class does SecureCookieSession inherit from besides SessionMixin?
Why is _lazy_sha1 used instead of directly referencing hashlib.sha1?
flask_sessions.answer: FIPS builds may not include SHA-1

flask_sessions.question: What does should_set_cookie return when the session is not modified but is permanent and SESSION_REFRESH_EACH_REQUEST is true?
What does save_session do when the session dict is empty and was modified?
flask_sessions.answer: It deletes the cookie from the response

marshmallow_validate.question: What is the default_message for the URL validator?
What are the four default URL schemes allowed by the marshmallow URL validator?
What is the default_message for the Email validator?
What tuple is the DOMAIN_WHITELIST in the Email validator?
What is the value of Range.message_gte?
What is the value of Range.message_lt?
What is the value of Length.message_min?
What is the value of Length.message_equal?
What happens if you pass both equal and min to the Length validator?
What is the default_message for the Equal validator?
Does the Regexp validator use re.match or re.search?
What is the default_message for the Regexp validator?
marshmallow_validate.answer: String does not match expected pattern.

marshmallow_validate.question: What is the default_message for the NoneOf validator?
What is the default_message for the OneOf validator?
What is the default_message for the ContainsOnly validator?
marshmallow_validate.answer: One or more of the choices you made was not in: {choices}.

marshmallow_validate.question: What is the default_message for the ContainsNoneOf validator?
marshmallow_validate.answer: One or more of the choices you made was in: {values}.

marshmallow_validate.question: What is the value of the module-level constant _UNICODE_LETTERS in marshmallow.validate?
What exception does the NoneOf validator catch silently in its __call__ method?
What does the And validator do when multiple validators fail?
marshmallow_validate.answer: It collects all error messages and raises a single ValidationError with all of them

marshmallow_validate.question: What ValueError message does the URL validator raise when both relative and absolute are set to False?
marshmallow_validate.answer: URL validation cannot set both relative and absolute to False.
